The plan labels it as Professional Freelancer Coverage (liability, cyber, public liability, equipment), which aligns with property or professional coverage, but such an item does not exist explicitly in ground-truth. Therefore, we cannot reliably map it to any provided rating and must omit it. Total_budget is not a rated item. Therefore, we map only the items with exact matches: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) = 9, and Adventure Travel Coverage (travel enhancement) = 10.
